answer:
Gorgias does not offer a free tier for its helpdesk service, though it provides a 7-day free trial without requiring a credit card [1].

Developer API access is available to users [1][2]. To access the API for development purposes, you must register on the Gorgias Developer Portal, create a draft application, and then contact techpartners@gorgias.com to request that a trial account be converted into a Developer Sandbox account [3][4]. Use of the API is subject to the terms of the Gorgias API License and Terms of Use [5].

results.title: 1. Register on Developer Portal & Get Gorgias Sandbox Account
Developers are required to comply with this HubSpot Developer Policy (this “Policy”), our Developer Terms and our Acceptable Use Policy ...
